prompt: An AI router that runs answers through a 'sycophancy detector' (re-runs prompt with adversarial reframing, votes) costs ~2x in tokens but catches ~80% of sycophantic answers. If sycophancy correlates with hallucination at r=0.5 in your domain, and hallucination has 10x downstream cost vs token cost, derive when the detector is net-positive and net-negative as a function of base sycophancy rate p. Express the break-even p in closed form.
notes: Quantitative threshold-derivation; operator-graded because closed-form may be expressed multiple ways.
